title: main.c:100-108 init_standalone_lora leaks init resources on partial failure
description: Gap found: Round 1 missed cleanup path issue. In init_standalone_lora(), if set_rx_callback (line 100) or start (line 107) fails, the function returns without calling lichen_lora_l2_deinit(), leaving the LoRa L2 layer initialized but in an inconsistent state. While this leads to a fatal error loop in standalone mode (which is acceptable), it violates the init/deinit pairing contract and could matter if this pattern were reused. HOW TO FIX: Add a cleanup label before each early return that calls lichen_lora_l2_deinit() when init had succeeded.
close_reason: Completed: init_standalone_lora now deinitializes LoRa L2 after post-init callback/start failures.
